testcase.name: test_property_types_api

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'packages': [{'description': 'Complete smart home orchestration for expansive estates with intelligent integration across all living spaces, outdoor areas, and staff quarters.', 'display_order': 1, 'hero_image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/652685c5fcc4fe419533d65239747e742e04f783ff9cc531f51a8c058955b31a.png', 'image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/652685c5fcc4fe419533d65239747e742e04f783ff9cc531f51a8c058955b31a.png', ...}, {'description': 'Elevated smart living for luxury penthouses with floor-to-ceiling automation, motorized shades, climate zones, and entertainment systems optimized for high-rise living.', 'display_order': 2, 'hero_image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/2ed51491b457899b2b796aae0871781bafb04f0ec076eee8e62bb2f8d1468fd0.png', 'image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/2ed51491b457899b2b796aae0871781bafb04f0ec076eee8e62bb2f8d1468fd0.png', ...}, {'description': 'Sophisticated automation for urban luxury living wit...g', ...}, {'description': 'Smart-enabled studio apartments perfect for developer projects. Pre-wired automation packages that attract modern renters and buyers.', 'display_order': 4, 'hero_image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/bad1cc08d3a3127f92a2f653798c2801e814e03efcda763679a79970534ee549.png', 'image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/bad1cc08d3a3127f92a2f653798c2801e814e03efcda763679a79970534ee549.png', ...}, {'description': 'Complete smart home packages for 1BR apartments. Pre-configured systems for consistent developer deployment across multiple units.', 'display_order': 5, 'hero_image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560448204-e02f11c3d0e2?q=85', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560448204-e02f11c3d0e2?q=85', ...}, {'description': 'Smart home automation for 2BR apartments. Ideal for families and developers seeking premium smart-enabled units.', 'display_order': 6, 'hero_image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522708323590-d24dbb6b0267?q=85', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522708323590-d24dbb6b0267?q=85', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa.py:84: in test_property_types_api assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'packages': [{'description': 'Complete smart home orchestration for expansive estates with intelligent integration across all living spaces, outdoor areas, and staff quarters.', 'display_order': 1, 'hero_image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/652685c5fcc4fe419533d65239747e742e04f783ff9cc531f51a8c058955b31a.png', 'image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/652685c5fcc4fe419533d65239747e742e04f783ff9cc531f51a8c058955b31a.png', ...}, {'description': 'Elevated smart living for luxury penthouses with floor-to-ceiling automation, motorized shades, climate zones, and entertainment systems optimized for high-rise living.', 'display_order': 2, 'hero_image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/2ed51491b457899b2b796aae0871781bafb04f0ec076eee8e62bb2f8d1468fd0.png', 'image': 'https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/94a1fe5f-abfa-4a63-b3ef-fd905e8c4bb0/images/2ed51491b457899b2b796aae0871781bafb04f0ec076eee8e62bb2f8d1468fd0.png', ...}, {'description': 'Sophisticated automation for urban luxury living wit...g', ...}, {'description': 'Smart-enabled studio apartments perfect for developer projects.
